/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -Wall -msse4.2 -mavx2 -mfma CMakeFiles/client.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/test/test_yolo11_sdk.cpp.o -o client   -L/usr/local/TensorRT-10.0.1.5/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/TensorRT-10.0.1.5/lib:/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/build:/home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib libyolo11_sdk.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_calib.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_photo.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_ptcloud.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_stereo.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_video.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.5.0.0 -lpthread /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_features.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_geometry.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_flann.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_core.so.5.0.0
